## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the workflow, UI, or behavior you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workarounds or alternative approaches you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, references, or related issues if they help explain the request.
